title: Ceres Nanoparticles Concentration and Extraction using MagMAX Wastewater kit
author: Shannon Fitz
materials: Sample is now ready for Part 2.

steps.title: Manual Ceres Nanotrap concentration using Nanotrap...
steps.instruction: Manual Ceres Nanotrap concentration using Nanotrap Microbiome A Particles for a 35 mL environmental sample

steps.title: Invert the environmental water sample 5 times to mix
steps.instruction: Invert the environmental water sample 5 times to mix. Then, let it sit for 45 seconds at room temperature. (No need to wait for samples to reach room temperature before processing).

steps.title: Agitate, then filter environmental water sample...
steps.instruction: Agitate, then filter environmental water sample through a coffee filter to remove suspended solids. Transfer 35 mL of filtered sample into a clean 50 mL conical tube.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of Nanotrap Enhancement...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of Nanotrap Enhancement Reagent 3 (ER3) to the sample, cap the tube, and then invert 2 times to mix.

steps.title: Add 525 µL of Nanotrap Microbiome...
steps.instruction: Add 525 µL of Nanotrap Microbiome A Particles (Nanotrap particles) to the sample, cap the sample and then invert 2 times to mix the particles.

steps.title: Incubate samples with Nanotrap particles at...
steps.instruction: Incubate samples with Nanotrap particles at room temperature for 30 minutes. Note: Invert every 5 minutes or use a rotator.

steps.title: Place the tube on a DynaMag-50...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a DynaMag-50 magnetic rack to separate the Nanotrap particles from the sample for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Using a serological pipette, discard the...
steps.instruction: Using a serological pipette, discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the Nanotrap particle pellet. Note: Can use a P-1000 or P-200 pipette to remove any remaining supernatant from the sample (be careful to not lose any Nanotrap particles when removing supernatant).

steps.title: Add 1 mL of Nanotrap Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of Nanotrap Buffer 2 to the tube and re-suspend the Nanotrap particle pellet by pipetting on the walls of the conical tube, gently re-suspend until all Nanotrap particles have been completely collected.

steps.title: Transfer the Nanotrap particle suspension to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the Nanotrap particle suspension to a new 2 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Place the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube...
steps.instruction: Place the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the Nanotrap particles from the sample for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Using a P-1000 pipette, discard the...
steps.instruction: Using a P-1000 pipette, discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the Nanotrap particle pellet. Note: If any small amount of liquid is still present, use a smaller pipette to remove all the supernatant from the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of MagMAX‱ Microbiome...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of MagMAX‱ Microbiome Lysis Solution to Nanotrap particle pellet, pipette up and down until Nanotrap particles are resuspended completely.

steps.title: Close the tube lid and incubate...
steps.instruction: Close the tube lid and incubate the samples on a heating block at 56°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Place the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube...
steps.instruction: Place the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the Nanotrap particles from the sample for 2 minutes. Note: May need to briefly centrifuge the tube (Mini Centrifuge at 2000 g for 2-5 seconds) to remove drops from inside the lid before magnetic separation.

steps.title: Transfer 400 µL of supernatant/lysate to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 µL of supernatant/lysate to a new 2 mL collection tube and discard the Nanotrap particles pellet.

steps.title: Part 2
steps.instruction: Part 2: Nanotrap Microbiome A MagMAX Wastewater Extraction Procedure

steps.title: Add 530 µL of MagMAX Binding Buffer to the sample/lysate
steps.instruction: Add 530 µL of MagMAX Binding Buffer to the sample/lysate.

steps.title: Add 10 µL of MagMAX Proteinase K to the sample/lysate
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL of MagMAX Proteinase K to the sample/lysate.

steps.title: Add 20 µL of MagMAX Magnetic Beads to the sample/lysate
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of MagMAX Magnetic Beads to the sample/lysate.

steps.title: Vortex to mix, then incubate at...
steps.instruction: Vortex to mix, then incubate at 65⁰C on a heat block for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the magnetic beads from the sample for 2 minutes, then discard the supernatant using a pipette. Note: May need to briefly centrifuge the tube (Mini Centrifuge at 2000 g for 2-5 seconds) to remove drops from inside the lid before magnetic separation.

steps.title: Add 1000 µL of MagMAX wash...
steps.instruction: Add 1000 µL of MagMAX wash buffer to sample and re-suspend the magnetic beads using a pipette.

steps.title: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the magnetic beads from the sample for 2 minutes, then discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1000 µL of 80% EtOH...
steps.instruction: Add 1000 µL of 80% EtOH to sample and re-suspend the magnetic beads using a pipette.

steps.title: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the magnetic beads from the sample for 2 minutes, then discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of 80% EtOH...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of 80% EtOH to sample and re-suspend the magnetic beads using a pipette.

steps.title: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the magnetic beads from the sample for 2 minutes, then discard the supernatant by using a pipette.

steps.title: Centrifuge the tube (Mini Centrifuge at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tube (Mini Centrifuge at 2000 g for 30 seconds).

steps.title: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2...
steps.instruction: Place the tube on a DynaMag-2 magnetic rack, then remove excess 80% EtOH using a smaller pipette.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of MagMAX Elution...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of MagMAX Elution Solution to re-suspend the magnetic beads and then incubate at 65⁰C for 10 minutes on a heat block (close caps).

steps.title: Place the tube in the DynaMag-2...
steps.instruction: Place the tube in the DynaMag-2 magnetic rack to separate the magnetic beads from the sample for 2 minutes. Note: May need to briefly centrifuge the tube (Mini Centrifuge at 2000 g for 2-5 seconds) to remove drops/condensation from inside the lid before magnetic separation.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new tube, the sample is ready for downstream analysis or can be stored at -80⁰C. Note: Multiple freeze-thaw cycles may cause degradation.
